programs.title: The Guardian
programs.desc: As Nick struggles with the possibility of Lulu leaving and James wrestles with his guilt over having beaten the wrong man, Burton is forced into a custody battle with Shannon's estranged father.

programs.title: The Guardian
programs.desc: Nick is assigned to represent the son of a sideshow performer who has accused the carnival's owner of molesting him; Burton looks to ease his conscience by tracking down the man he and Nick assaulted.

programs.title: The Guardian
programs.desc: Nick's legal work on behalf of a big coal operator puts his loyalties to the test when he discovers that a teenage girl's cancer is a result of his client's negligence.

programs.title: The Guardian
programs.desc: Nick represents a teenaged prostitute whose pimp specializes in young girls; the pending sale of a family's department store is threatened by an alleged shoplifter's accusations of racial profiling.

programs.title: The Guardian
programs.desc: Nick is asked by a recovering drug addict to help regain custody of his blind twelve-year-old daughter; a longtime client's lawsuit against a fertility clinic exposes an extramarital affair.

programs.title: The Guardian
programs.desc: As they square off in court over the city's efforts to condemn a church property, Nick and Lulu carry on a clandestine sexual affair in the most unusual places.
